title: Eva As A Total Work of Art
display_title: Eva As A Total Work of Art
wikitext:
[]: Eva As A Total Work of Art             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Jul 25, 2012 11:40 pm This is the first time I've started a thread in the discussion subforum so bear with me. I am wondering if any of you think that NGE, or at least certain episodes, could be considered an example of Gesamtkunstwerk, or a total work of art (here's the wikipedia article on the subject) ? If I understand the article, at least some episodes; 22', 24', and EoE in particular, could fit the definintion. Discuss if you care to.
